name: Los Angeles Neighborhood Housing Services, Inc
description_short: Los Angeles Neighborhood Housing Services provides HUD-approved housing counseling and non-profit financial guidance to LA County residents seeking homeownership and financial stability.
description_long: Los Angeles Neighborhood Housing Services, Inc. (NHS) is a non-profit organization serving Los Angeles County residents with HUD-approved housing counseling and financial education services. Founded to address housing and financial challenges in underserved communities, the organization operates as a certified counselor agency providing expert guidance on complex financial and housing matters. The organization's website indicates their primary focus is on housing counseling and credit-related support delivered through trained, certified counselors. NHS serves as a resource for consumers seeking professional, unbiased financial guidance without commercial interests. Their positioning as a non-profit with HUD approval signals alignment with federal standards for housing counselor certification and consumer protection. The organization's service model emphasizes education and counseling rather than product sales or debt management services. As a free-help provider, NHS operates under the mission of helping consumers understand their financial options and improve their housing situations. The specific service details and current program offerings cannot be fully verified due to website access limitations at the time of profile creation.
pros: HUD-approved housing counselor services meeting federal certification standards
Non-profit organization with no financial incentive to sell products or services
Serves Los Angeles County residents with specialized local market knowledge
Free or low-cost financial counseling model removes access barriers
Certified professional counselors provide objective third-party guidance
Focus on housing counseling addresses root financial stability concerns
cons: Website currently inaccessible for verification of current programs and service details
Unable to confirm specific service offerings, hours, or contact methods from provided content
No clear information on whether services are entirely free or have nominal fees
Limited ability to assess breadth of services beyond housing counseling focus
Geographic service area limited to Los Angeles County only
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking HUD-approved counseling in LA County
Low-to-moderate income residents needing free financial education
Consumers seeking objective, non-profit credit and housing guidance
diagnosis: NHS is best for Los Angeles County residents seeking trustworthy, free housing and financial counseling from certified non-profit professionals without product sales pressure. Primary limitation is website inaccessibility preventing full verification of current service scope, pricing, and availability.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 3926 Wilshire Blvd Ste 200, Los Angeles, CA 90010
